Australia's first DIY curly tape extension kit

Your curls.
Longer, fuller, finally.

The Curl Collection is Australia's first DIY tape extension kit made specifically for wavy and curly hair. It adds length and volume, and actually blends with your texture. Two textures. Three lengths. One kit.

To apply at home

Every extension kit was made for straight hair. We noticed.

If you’ve got curls, you already know the story. Every option is straight, smooth and silky. The textures don’t match, and the volume you hoped for never happens because the hair sits differently to yours. The Curl Collection exists to change that.

Two textures. Made for your hair, not someone else’s.

Not all curls are the same. Neither are our kits. Find your match below - or take the quiz and we’ll tell you exactly which texture and length to order.

Natural Wave on 2B hair - photo coming
For 2A & 2B curls

Natural Wave

Soft, flowing movement that blends with loose waves and lightly textured hair. Adds length and restores volume to hair that has lost its fullness over time.

Wears close to length16 / 20 / 24″From $699
Water Wave on 3A hair - photo coming
For 2C & 3A curls

Water Wave

Defined, bouncy, full of personality. A rippled pattern that moves the way your natural curls do, adding serious volume as well as length for hair that compresses as it grows.

Wears ~15–20% shorter16 / 20 / 24″From $699

Four ridiculously easy steps.

From kit to gorgeous - your first install in 30 to 45 minutes

Step photo
1

Choose your kit

Pick your colour, length and texture - Natural Wave or Water Wave.

2

Tape it up

Apply tape to each of the wefts, ready to place.

3

Section your hair

Create neat horizontal sections and clip the rest out of the way.

4

Press down, sit down

Apply 1cm below your section line, press down, and let your hair fall over.

Worn Straight

One kit.
Endless options.

Style your extensions as you like. Real hair. Real versatility.

Worn Wavy
Australia’s Only Curly Kit

Finally. Extensions for curly hair.

Other extension kits are made for straight and wavy hair. Curly hair has been left out. Until now.

Short Story Long is the only DIY extension brand in Australia with a curly kit. Our wefts move, blend, and behave like your natural texture.

Your curls deserve length, thickness, and volume too.

Shop the Curl Collection

For every curly girl who was told extensions weren't for her.

The hair industry has left curly girls out of this conversation for too long. Every kit made for straight hair. Every single one.

So we built something for them. Two textures. Three lengths. A care guide written for your actual routine. And finally, volume as well as length.

“Length and volume, for curly hair, at a price that makes sense.”

Frequently asked questions

Natural Wave has a soft, flowing wave - best for 2A and 2B curl types. Water Wave is more defined and bouncy - made for 2C and 3A. Not sure which is yours? Take our texture quiz.
6 to 9 months with proper care and regular reapplication every 3 to 4 weeks. Re-tape rolls and removal spray are included in the kit.
Curly extensions are measured straight. When your curl springs up, the worn length is shorter than the label - Natural Wave wears close to it, Water Wave wears about 15 to 20% shorter. The coiling is what creates the volume. We show both measurements on every product page. If in doubt, size up.
Yes - for many of our customers that’s the main reason. Curly hair loses fullness as it grows because the curl drops and compresses. The right extensions add volume and density as well as length.
Yes, with one adjustment. On install day, wash twice with the SSL clarifying shampoo - even if you normally co-wash - to remove buildup that stops the tape bonding. After that, your usual routine is fine. Keep conditioners, creams and oils at least 2cm clear of the bonds.
Yes. Diffuse at medium heat on low speed, holding the diffuser 10 to 15cm from your roots. Don’t press it directly onto the bond area.
If you’re not satisfied, contact us within 30 days at hello@shortstorylong.com.au and we’ll do everything we can to make it right.
Email hello@shortstorylong.com.au with two photos in natural daylight - one with your hair down, one close-up of the mid-lengths. Avoid filters and indoor light. We’ll recommend a match before you order.
